title: 原小鹏汽车自动驾驶负责人李立云加盟中清出任CTO，加速实体AI发展
description: 通过将自动驾驶领域成熟的“工业化AI”方法论、高效的数据飞轮以及强大的工程部署能力引入到实体AI赛道，众清加速构建以原生多模态输入为驱动、中枢与外围系统协同的全集成架构。
titleZh: 原小鹏汽车自动驾驶负责人李立云加盟中清出任CTO，加速实体AI发展
titleEn: Li Liyun, Former Head of Autonomous Driving at Xpeng, Joins Zhongqing as CTO to Accelerate the Development of Embodied AI
descriptionZh: 通过将自动驾驶领域成熟的“工业化AI”方法论、高效的数据飞轮以及强大的工程部署能力引入到实体AI赛道，众清加速构建以原生多模态输入为驱动、中枢与外围系统协同的全集成架构。
descriptionEn: By introducing the mature "industrialized AI" methodology, efficient data flywheel, and robust engineering deployment capabilities from the autonomous driving field into the embodied AI track, Zhongqing accelerates the development of a fully integrated architecture driven by native multimodal inputs and featuring the collaboration of central and peripheral systems.
